base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tourian_metroid_grab — a character (playable) from 1986 metroid. Metroid — jellyfish energy-parasite (game namesake). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Metroid — jellyfish energy-parasite (game namesake); 4-frame: drift / fangs-open / lock-onto-Samus / drain-energy. Only Ice Beam + Missiles can kill; Ice freezes into platform-block that can be shattered by 5 missiles
